title: The Second Battle of Mag Tuired
description: The Tuatha De Danann wage war against the Fomorians — the Irish Titanomachy.
introduction: The Tuatha De Danann wage war against the Fomorians — the Irish Titanomachy.

translation.original_text: Batar Tuatha De Danann i n-insib tuaiscertachaib an domain.
translation.text: The Tuatha De Danann were in the northern islands of the world.
